content_body: This is our second time renting Cadence Ridge. It is a beautiful cabin that suited four couples perfectly. The furnishings are gorgeous, and the views are beautiful! We had such a relaxing, bonding vacation. The hikes to Long Creek Falls and Amicalola Falls were great exercise (much needed after all the great eating!). The shopping in Blue Ridge was fun for all the girls. Thanks for making this beautiful cabin available for us to enjoy!
title: Second Time Renting Cadence Ridge
